description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a dark brown finish, featuring a simple and functional design. The desk has four sturdy legs and a flat, spacious tabletop suitable for writing or working. On one side, there is a single integrated drawer or compartment, providing some storage space for small items or documents. The opposite side is open, allowing for comfortable legroom. The wood grain texture is visible across all surfaces, giving the desk a natural and slightly rustic appearance. The construction appears solid, with a crossbar near the base for additional stability.
description: A dark brown wooden desk with a flat top, sturdy legs, and a single side drawer, featuring a natural wood grain texture.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid panel and leg structure, with the drawer not visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open leg space and the single drawer compartment on the right side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the solid panel and no visible drawer.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a full-width panel beneath the tabletop and the crossbar at the base.
attribute_orientation: The side with the open leg space and visible drawer is intended to face the user, serving as the front of the desk, while the solid panel side is the back.
